case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. DAVID W. YOUNT et al

SEPARATE STATEMENT OF DISPUTED AND UNIDSPUTED MATERIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNT, DAVID W.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS SATISFIED ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION AND DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT PRESENTED ANY FACTS CREATING A TRIABLE ISSUE. THE UNDISPUTED EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR IN THE AMOUNT OF $203,241.97 AS OF MARCH 8, 2012. DEFENDANTS' WAIVER ARGUMENTS LACK MERIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DAVID YOUNT AND CATHERINE YANNI'S MOTION TO PERMIT THE FILING OF FIRST AMENDED ANSWER CONTRACT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 23, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. IT APPEARS THAT THE MOTION IS, IN PRACTICAL EFFECT, A PARTIAL OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL HARABURDA CSR # 8052
OBJECTIONS TO DEFT'S EVIDENCE IN OPPOS. TO MTN FOR SUMMARY /ADJUDICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DAVID YOUNT AND CATHERINE A. YANNI'S MOTION TO PERMIT THE FILING OF FIRST AMENDED ANSWER-CONTRACT. ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. IN LIGHT OF THE RULING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF WOULD BE PREJUDICED BY PERMITTING DEFENDANTS TO FILE AN AMENDED ANSWER. MOREOVER, IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT THERE IS ANY MERIT TO ANY OF THE PROPOSED NEW DEFENSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO PERMIT LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNT, DAVID W. YANNI, CATHERINE A (SUED INCORRECTLY AS CATHERINE M YANNI) $197,954.38 PRINCIPAL, $4,977.59 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $202,931.97, SEE SCANNED DOC
